title: Private Equity Eyes These 3 Fintech Names as Consolidation Accelerates
full_text: Yes, payments fintech is consolidating. Card networks want more control over card issuance, processors are chasing small-business customers, and private equity is hunting for profitable software companies selling at a massive discount from their 2021 peaks. Three beaten-down merchant and small and medium-sized business payments names stand out as plausible takeover targets. No deals have ... Private Equity Eyes These 3 Fintech Names as Consolidation Accelerates
